/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c++14 -pthread -O2 -g -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/dbsync_test_tool.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../bin/dbsync_test_tool   -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/sqlite  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/cJSON  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/dbsync/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/sqlite:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/cJSON:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/dbsync/build/lib ../lib/libdbsync.so -lpthread -ldl -lwazuhext
